title: selaginella dianzhongensis
intro: Selaginella dianzhongensis, also known as Dianzhong spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss in the family Selaginellaceae. It is an evergreen, perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. Selaginella dianzhongensis has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial properties, and is often used in herbal preparations, such as tea or capsules.
